synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-23342 Moderate: Oracle Linux 9 python3.9 security update
description:
[3.9.25-2.0.1]
- Remove upstream URL reference

[3.9.25-2]
- Move _sysconfigdata_d_linux*.py to the debug subpackage

[3.9.25-1]
- Update to Python 3.9.25

[3.9.24-1]
- Update to Python 3.9.24
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-23342

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-23342.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:

aarch64:

python3-libs-3.9.25-2.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
python3-test-3.9.25-2.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm

Description of changes:

[3.9.25-2.0.1]
- Remove upstream URL reference

[3.9.25-2]
- Move _sysconfigdata_d_linux*.py to the debug subpackage

[3.9.25-1]
- Update to Python 3.9.25

[3.9.24-1]
- Update to Python 3.9.24
